Brief description of the changes in this PR.

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test addition/improvement

- Change 2
- Change 3

## Documentation

- [ ] Code is self-documenting with clear variable names and comments
- [ ] Docstrings added/updated for public functions
- [ ] README.md updated (if needed)
- [ ] Documentation updated in `docs/` (if needed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if applicable)

## Checklist

**Code Quality:**
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines (PEP 8)
- [ ] Code has been formatted with `black`
- [ ] Imports sorted with `isort`
- [ ] No linting errors (`flake8`)
- [ ] Type hints added where appropriate
- [ ] No commented-out code or debug prints

**Testing:**
- [ ] Existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Edge cases considered and tested
- [ ] No warnings or errors in test output

**Documentation:**
- [ ] Changes are documented
- [ ] Examples provided (if applicable)
- [ ] Breaking changes highlighted

**Git:**
- [ ] Branch is up-to-date with main
- [ ] Clean commit history (squashed if needed)
- [ ] Descriptive commit messages
- [ ] No merge conflicts

## Performance Impact

Does this PR affect performance?

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Performance improved
- [ ] Performance may be affected (explain below)

```
Before: [timing/memory]
After: [timing/memory]
```

Add screenshots for UI changes or visual outputs.

- Design decisions
